messages.subject: Application Accepted
messages.message: Congratulations! Your application has been accepted. A staff member will follow up with next steps shortly.

messages.subject: Lifeline Academy Application Update
messages.message:
Hello!

Thank you so much for your interest in joining Lifeline Academy and for applying for the School Counselor position. We truly appreciate the time and care you put into your application.

At this time, the School Counselor role will be minimally needed, and we’re currently unable to clearly identify where this position would best fit within our active school structure. Because of this, we’re unable to move forward with placement for this role right now.

That said, teachers at Lifeline Academy are able to hold more than one role. If you’re still interested in being part of our team, you may also apply as a Workshop Teacher—for example, teaching Photography, Decor, Creative Arts, or similar specialty workshops—while still retaining the School Counselor role for future use as the academy continues to grow.

If you’d like more clarification, would like to discuss alternative placements, or are still interested in joining in another capacity, please feel free to open a support ticket and a staff member will be happy to assist you.

We truly appreciate your interest and hope to work with you in the future.

Warm regards,
Tammy Brightwood 🦉
Lifeline Academy Concierge

messages.subject: Welcome to Lifeline Academy! 🎉
messages.message:
Hello!

Congratulations and welcome to Lifeline Academy! We’re excited to let you know that you’ve been accepted for the Elementary Teacher position. We truly appreciate your interest, experience, and enthusiasm, and we’re so happy to have you joining our academy team.

As a reminder, teachers at Lifeline Academy are able to hold multiple roles. In addition to your elementary position, you’re welcome to take on Workshop Teacher roles as well — such as teaching the Basics of Roleplay (RP), Decor & Design, or other creative or educational workshops that align with your interests and skills.

If you have any questions, would like to explore additional roles, or need help getting started, please feel free to open a support ticket, and a staff member will be happy to assist you.

Welcome aboard — we’re excited to build and grow with you!

Warm regards,
Tammy Brightwood 🦉
Lifeline Academy Concierge

messages.subject: Lifeline Academy Application Accepted 🎓
messages.message:
Hello!

We’re happy to share that your application for the High School Teacher position at Lifeline Academy has been accepted. Congratulations, and welcome to the team! We’re excited to have you join us and contribute to our growing academy.

Please note that teachers at Lifeline Academy may hold additional roles if they’re interested. This can include Workshop Teaching opportunities or other specialty roles as the academy continues to expand.

If you’d like to explore additional roles, have questions about next steps, or need any clarification, feel free to open a support ticket, and a staff member will be happy to assist you.

We’re looking forward to working with you and seeing the impact you’ll bring to our students.

Warm regards,
Tammy Brightwood 🦉
Lifeline Academy Concierge

messages.subject: Welcome to Lifeline Academy Day Care Team! 🌈
messages.message:
Hello!

We’re happy to let you know that your application for the Day Care Teacher position at Lifeline Academy has been accepted. Congratulations and welcome! We’re excited to have you joining our academy and helping care for and guide our youngest learners.

As a reminder, teachers at Lifeline Academy may hold multiple roles. In addition to your day care position, you’re welcome to explore Workshop Teacher roles or other supportive roles as the academy grows, depending on your interests and availability.

If you have any questions, would like to take on additional roles, or need help with next steps, please feel free to open a support ticket, and a staff member will be happy to assist you.

We’re so glad to have you on board and look forward to working with you!

Warm regards,
Tammy Brightwood 🦉
Lifeline Academy Concierge
